playlists.title: Tia Gostelow
playlists.subtitle: subtitle
playlists.description: Australian singer-songwriter Tia Gostelow visited the Pusher studios to write a beautiful EP of alternative indie folk songs. The 3 tracks were written and produced by long-term collaborator Matthew McGuffie, in collaboration with Pusher producer Dan Austin

playlists.title: Playlist 2:Electronic Essentials
playlists.subtitle: Timeless tracks from electronic music pioneers
playlists.description: From early synth explorations to contemporary productions, this playlist charts the evolution of electronic music. Essential listening for anyone interested in the genre's rich history and ongoing innovation.

playlists.title: Late Night Jazz
playlists.subtitle: Sophisticated sounds for nocturnal listening
playlists.description: Smooth jazz, soul, and neo-soul selections perfect for late-night listening sessions. Features both classic recordings and contemporary artists keeping the tradition alive.

playlists.title: Experimental Edge
playlists.subtitle: Pushing boundaries and challenging expectations
playlists.description: For the adventurous listener. This collection features artists who refuse to be confined by genre conventions, creating bold, unconventional sonic experiences.

playlists.title: House Foundations
playlists.subtitle: Essential house music from past to present
playlists.description: A journey through house music's evolution, from Chicago origins to global phenomenon. Includes deep house, tech house, and everything in between.

playlists.title: Ethereal Voices
playlists.subtitle: Haunting vocals and atmospheric production
playlists.description: A collection showcasing the power of the human voice in electronic and experimental contexts. From ethereal whispers to commanding performances.
